verdict_reason: Tags on BG 2.25 are deprecation-management, spec-vs-behavior, letting-go. deprecation-management is shared with 2.21 — the doctrines are coherent (both verses turn on the engineer's stance toward deprecated code, with 2.25 supplying the closing instruction). spec-vs-behavior is shared across the entire imperishable block (2.21-2.25) — coherent. letting-go is appropriate for the closing-instruction role; it is not 'detachment from work in general' but specifically letting go of grief at the wrong layer, which the verse itself names. The three tags together cover three distinct angles. No cross_references[] declared. Score 8. PASS.
